meta.title: {{domain}} -- TNP
meta.description: DNS records, status, and details for {{domain}} on The Network Protocol.
meta.ogDescription: Details for {{domain}} on The Network Protocol.

howToResolveDesc: To resolve <accent>{{domain}}</accent> on your device, install the TNP resolver. It configures your system DNS to query TNP nameservers for TNP domains while forwarding everything else to your default resolver.

notFound.title: Domain not found
notFound.description: {{domain}} is not registered on TNP or may have been released.
